creator: freebsd.users@gmail.com
text:
The build fails at /usr/src/sys/modules/aac. Here are full details - http://paste.pocoo.org/show/562737/

My env - http://paste.pocoo.org/show/562246/

The build fails with GENERIC and custom KERNCONF at same stage. I am buildworld and kernel-toolchain without any problem.

How-To-Repeat: csup the source tree with stable-supfile & rebuild the kernel.
